title: Senior Product Engineer (AI & Growth Systems)
description:
Cubby Beds develops intelligent beds for individuals with cognitive conditions including epilepsy, cerebral palsy, dementia, and autism. The company operates profitably across all 50 states with insurance coverage.

Core Responsibilities

The successful candidate will design and deploy AI-powered workflows, growth infrastructure, and internal tools that enhance operational efficiency. Key duties include:

- Building and launching AI workflows tied to measurable business outcomes
- Implementing monitoring systems and quality controls for AI reliability
- Partnering cross-functionally to ensure team adoption and continuous improvement
- Documenting impact metrics on usage, performance, and ROI

Required Qualifications

- 4+ years building production systems, automation, or internal tools
- API integration and data systems expertise
- Real-world LLM workflow implementation experience
- Proficiency with AI-assisted development tools
- Strong product thinking connected to business outcomes
- Comfort operating in ambiguous, under-specified environments
- Bias toward rapid shipping and iteration

Preferred Qualifications

- Modern AI exploration (prompt engineering, agents, automation)
- Healthcare or financial services regulatory background
- Early-stage startup or high-ambiguity environment experience

Benefits

Health, dental, vision insurance; unlimited PTO; 401(k) matching; equity; paid holidays; stocked office kitchen; annual retreat; professional development opportunities.
